findings.root_cause: Long prompt/context and real local LLM calls create a high tail latency even when the tool count is small.
findings.suggested_fix: Shorten prompt/examples, disable verbose_system, use context_size=1, reset context every turn, cap max_completion_tokens, keep cache enabled.

findings.root_cause: The previous prompt/examples and multi-turn context added unnecessary prompt tokens for mostly standalone order questions.
findings.suggested_fix: Use a compact system prompt and shorter few-shot examples; keep planner=false and self_consistency=1.

findings.root_cause: The model sometimes echoed contact instructions; redaction hid the raw PII but left contact placeholders in final answers.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt says never repeat contact data; wrapper strips redacted contact phrases after PII redaction and on cache hits.

findings.root_cause: The LLM can misapply integer discounts or shipping values at nonzero temperature.
findings.suggested_fix: Keep temperature low, require exact floor arithmetic in prompt, and recompute payable totals in wrapper when trace data is available.

findings.root_cause: Order notes can contain fake system instructions, fake prices, or fake discounts.
findings.suggested_fix: Treat all customer notes as data in the prompt and strip likely injected note suffixes before calling the agent.
